Bug / Task Description: MVRegister.Set in pkg/crdt/register.go must preserve concurrent values written by different replicas while dropping only versions the new write causally dominates. Currently a new write can discard a concurrent value authored by a DIFFERENT node whenever that node's per-node counter is <= the incoming counter, so concurrent updates that should coexist collapse into one and Get/Len under-report live versions. Per-node counters are only comparable within the same node's history.
Commit Subject: fix(crdt): scope MVRegister supersede to same node
